title: Ydw Valley and Fron Road Geological Exposures
summary: Ydw Valley and Fron Road Geological Exposures are four separate areas displaying lower Silurian geology. They are a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Carmarthen & Dinefwr,  Wales.
text: Ydw Valley and Fron Road Geological Exposures are four separate areas displaying lower Silurian geology. They are a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Carmarthen & Dinefwr,  Wales.
